channel.title: Can't import the named export 'URL' from non EcmaScript module (only default export is available)
channel.description:
Hi there,
I've just created a fresh install of a Frontity project but when I run `npx frontity dev` I get the following error message
**ERROR in ./node_modules/node-fetch/lib/index.mjs 1157:15-18**
**Can't import the named export 'URL' from non EcmaScript module (only default export is available)**
Why would that happen? Thanks

item.title: Can't import the named export 'URL' from non EcmaScript module (only default export is available)
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
This is fixed now. Please update your Frontity packages using this guide: Keep Frontity Updated - Frontity Docs

Read full topic
item.source: Can't import the named export 'URL' from non EcmaScript module (only default export is available)

item.title: Can't import the named export 'URL' from non EcmaScript module (only default export is available)
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
Working on the fix right now: https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/868

Read full topic
item.source: Can't import the named export 'URL' from non EcmaScript module (only default export is available)

item.title: Can't import the named export 'URL' from non EcmaScript module (only default export is available)
item.dc:creator: jeff
item.description:
Hi there,

I’ve just created a fresh install of a Frontity project but when I run npx frontity dev I get the following error message

ERROR in ./node_modules/node-fetch/lib/index.mjs 1157:15-18

Can’t import the named export ‘URL’ from non EcmaScript module (only default export is available)

Why would that happen?
Thanks

Read full topic
item.source: Can't import the named export 'URL' from non EcmaScript module (only default export is available)
